requirement_topic.en: Market-Access Route — NBSM NS Certification, In-Country Importer & Landlocked Logistics via Indian Ports
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入路径——NBSM NS认证、在地进口商及经印度港口的内陆物流
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入路徑——NBSM NS認證、在地進口商及經印度港口的內陸物流

summary.en: Market access to Nepal for household refrigerators is structured around three elements. (1) NBSM NS conformity: the Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology operates NS certification/conformity for regulated products; where the refrigerator is within mandatory scope, an NS mark/certificate (technical basis NS/IEC 60335-2-24) is required, typically held by or arranged through the in-country importer. (2) In-country importer/representative: a Nepali importer is the practical counterparty that handles NS application, customs clearance, local-language marking, energy-label generation, and any NTA approval for connected variants — a foreign manufacturer generally cannot place goods on the Nepal market without one. (3) Logistics: Nepal is landlocked, so sea freight from China arrives at Indian ports — typically Kolkata or Visakhapatnam (Vizag) — and moves overland into Nepal under the Nepal-India transit arrangements, with Indian transit documentation in addition to Nepali import clearance. Exporters should align Incoterms, transit paperwork, and NS/customs responsibilities with the importer early. Status: INFORMATIONAL.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔家用电冰箱的市场准入围绕三要素构建。（1）NBSM NS合格评定：尼泊尔标准与计量局对受管制产品实施NS认证/合格评定；若电冰箱属强制范围，须取得NS标志/证书（技术基准NS/IEC 60335-2-24），通常由在地进口商持有或经其安排。（2）在地进口商/代表：尼泊尔进口商为实际对手方，办理NS申请、清关、当地语言标识、能效标签生成及联网版本的任何NTA核准——外国制造商通常无进口商即无法在尼泊尔市场投放货物。（3）物流：尼泊尔为内陆国，故自中国的海运抵达印度港口——通常为加尔各答或维沙卡帕特南（Vizag）——并依尼印过境安排陆运入尼，除尼泊尔进口清关外另需印度过境单据。出口商应尽早与进口商对齐贸易术语、过境文件及NS/海关责任。状态：信息性。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾家用電冰箱的市場准入圍繞三要素構建。（1）NBSM NS合格評定：尼泊爾標準與計量局對受管制產品實施NS認證/合格評定；若電冰箱屬強制範圍，須取得NS標誌/證書（技術基準NS/IEC 60335-2-24），通常由在地進口商持有或經其安排。（2）在地進口商/代表：尼泊爾進口商為實際對手方，辦理NS申請、清關、當地語言標識、能效標籤生成及聯網版本的任何NTA核准——外國製造商通常無進口商即無法在尼泊爾市場投放貨物。（3）物流：尼泊爾為內陸國，故自中國的海運抵達印度港口——通常為加爾各答或維沙卡帕特南（Vizag）——並依尼印過境安排陸運入尼，除尼泊爾進口清關外另需印度過境單據。出口商應盡早與進口商對齊貿易術語、過境文件及NS/海關責任。狀態：資訊性。

standards_or_laws: NBSM NS certification/conformity — mandatory for regulated products (technical basis NS/IEC 60335-2-24 for refrigerators)
In-country Nepali importer/representative — practical owner of NS application, customs clearance, marking, labelling and NTA approval
Nepal-India transit arrangement — landlocked routing via Kolkata / Visakhapatnam (Vizag) ports with Indian transit documentation

summary.en: Domestically, a Chinese refrigerator reaches the China market through CCC certification (GB 4706.13 safety, GB 4343.x EMC, GB 12021.2 energy) administered by SAMR/CNCA, with the China Energy Label, and is distributed by the manufacturer or domestic distributors without any foreign-importer or cross-border transit step. There is no equivalent to the Nepal in-country importer requirement, the NBSM NS conformity step, or landlocked routing via a third country's ports. For export, the manufacturer typically ships FOB/CIF from a Chinese port; the China-side controls (CCC, CEL, SRRC) are domestic and do not satisfy Nepal market access. The Nepal route adds the importer, NS conformity, Nepal customs, and Indian transit logistics that have no counterpart in the purely domestic China model.
summary.zh: 在国内，中国电冰箱通过CCC认证（GB 4706.13安全、GB 4343.x EMC、GB 12021.2能效，由SAMR/CNCA管理）配合中国能效标识进入中国市场，由制造商或国内经销商分销，无任何外国进口商或跨境过境环节。不存在等同尼泊尔在地进口商要求、NBSM NS合格评定环节或经第三国港口的内陆路由。就出口而言，制造商通常自中国港口以FOB/CIF发货；中国侧管控（CCC、CEL、SRRC）属国内性质，不满足尼泊尔市场准入。尼泊尔路径增加了进口商、NS合格评定、尼泊尔海关及印度过境物流，这些在纯国内的中国模式中并无对应。
summary.zht: 在國內，中國電冰箱通過CCC認證（GB 4706.13安全、GB 4343.x EMC、GB 12021.2能效，由SAMR/CNCA管理）配合中國能效標識進入中國市場，由製造商或國內經銷商分銷，無任何外國進口商或跨境過境環節。不存在等同尼泊爾在地進口商要求、NBSM NS合格評定環節或經第三國港口的內陸路由。就出口而言，製造商通常自中國港口以FOB/CIF發貨；中國側管控（CCC、CEL、SRRC）屬國內性質，不滿足尼泊爾市場准入。尼泊爾路徑增加了進口商、NS合格評定、尼泊爾海關及印度過境物流，這些在純國內的中國模式中並無對應。

standards_or_laws: CCC certification (GB 4706.13 / GB 4343.x / GB 12021.2) — administered by SAMR/CNCA for domestic sale
Domestic distribution — no foreign importer, NS conformity, or cross-border transit equivalent

gap.en: The Nepal route is fundamentally importer-led and logistics-constrained, with no shortcut from China's domestic certifications. Action items: (a) appoint a competent Nepali importer/representative before shipment and assign NS application, customs, marking, labelling and any NTA approval to them; (b) confirm with NBSM whether the model is in mandatory NS scope and assemble IEC-aligned test evidence (China CCC certificates are not accepted as-is); (c) plan landlocked logistics — sea leg to Kolkata or Vizag, Indian transit documentation, then overland clearance into Nepal under the Nepal-India transit framework; and (d) align Incoterms so transit-country (India) and destination (Nepal) duties/responsibilities are clear. The China-domestic model (direct CCC + distributor) has no equivalent to these steps, so they must be planned from scratch with the importer. Verify current NBSM scope and transit procedures locally.
gap.zh: 尼泊尔路径根本上以进口商为主导且受物流约束，无法借中国国内认证走捷径。行动事项：（a）发货前委任有能力的尼泊尔进口商/代表，并将NS申请、海关、标识、标签及任何NTA核准交由其负责；（b）向NBSM确认型号是否属强制NS范围，并备齐IEC对齐的检测证据（中国CCC证书不被原样接受）；（c）规划内陆物流——海运至加尔各答或Vizag、印度过境单据，再依尼印过境框架陆运清关入尼；（d）对齐贸易术语，明确过境国（印度）与目的国（尼泊尔）的关税/责任。中国国内模式（直接CCC+经销商）对这些步骤并无对应，须与进口商从头规划。请向当地核实现行NBSM范围与过境程序。
gap.zht: 尼泊爾路徑根本上以進口商為主導且受物流約束，無法借中國國內認證走捷徑。行動事項：（a）發貨前委任有能力的尼泊爾進口商/代表，並將NS申請、海關、標識、標籤及任何NTA核准交由其負責；（b）向NBSM確認型號是否屬強制NS範圍，並備齊IEC對齊的檢測證據（中國CCC證書不被原樣接受）；（c）規劃內陸物流——海運至加爾各答或Vizag、印度過境單據，再依尼印過境框架陸運清關入尼；（d）對齊貿易術語，明確過境國（印度）與目的國（尼泊爾）的關稅/責任。中國國內模式（直接CCC+經銷商）對這些步驟並無對應，須與進口商從頭規劃。請向當地核實現行NBSM範圍與過境程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (structural) — in-country importer and Nepal customs clearance required; NBSM NS conformity required where the model is in regulated scope; landlocked routing via Indian ports is a logistical necessity
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable domestically — China sale via CCC + domestic distribution; no importer/NS/transit equivalent

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM) / Department of Customs, Nepal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal market access for refrigerators is importer-led: appoint a Nepali importer to handle NBSM NS conformity (where the model is regulated), customs, marking, labelling and any NTA approval. China's CCC/CEL/SRRC are domestic and not accepted as-is. Plan landlocked logistics via Kolkata or Vizag with Indian transit documentation under the Nepal-India transit framework. Confirm current NBSM scope and transit procedures with the importer and a qualified consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔电冰箱市场准入以进口商为主导：委任尼泊尔进口商办理NBSM NS合格评定（型号受管制时）、海关、标识、标签及任何NTA核准。中国CCC/CEL/SRRC属国内性质，不被原样接受。规划经加尔各答或Vizag的内陆物流，依尼印过境框架准备印度过境单据。请向进口商及合格顾问确认现行NBSM范围与过境程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾電冰箱市場准入以進口商為主導：委任尼泊爾進口商辦理NBSM NS合格評定（型號受管制時）、海關、標識、標籤及任何NTA核准。中國CCC/CEL/SRRC屬國內性質，不被原樣接受。規劃經加爾各答或Vizag的內陸物流，依尼印過境框架準備印度過境單據。請向進口商及合格顧問確認現行NBSM範圍與過境程序。

requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Regimes Not Operated by Nepal — RoHS, Battery, Outdoor-Noise (EU-style obligations do not apply)
requirement_topic.zh: 尼泊尔未实施的横向制度——RoHS、电池、户外噪声（欧盟式义务不适用）
requirement_topic.zht: 尼泊爾未實施的橫向制度——RoHS、電池、戶外噪聲（歐盟式義務不適用）

summary.en: Nepal does not operate EU-style horizontal product regimes for household refrigerators. Specifically: there is no Nepal equivalent of the EU RoHS Directive (restriction of hazardous substances in electrical/electronic equipment), no EU-style Batteries Regulation producer-responsibility/registration regime, and no EU-style Outdoor Noise Directive (environmental noise marking of outdoor equipment). A refrigerator entering Nepal is therefore governed by NBSM NS conformity (safety, and EMC where applicable), the energy programme where it applies, refrigerant handling at the appliance level, NTA approval for connected variants, and importer/customs requirements — but not by a separate RoHS/battery/noise marking obligation as exists in the EU. This must be stated plainly so exporters do not assume EU horizontal compliance is required or, conversely, that EU RoHS/CE artwork substitutes for NBSM NS conformity. Exporters should still meet any contractual or buyer-imposed material-restriction or environmental requirements, and verify there is no newly introduced Nepal rule. Status: INFORMATIONAL.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔不对家用电冰箱实施欧盟式横向产品制度。具体而言：尼泊尔无对应欧盟RoHS指令（电气/电子设备有害物质限制）的制度、无欧盟式电池法规生产者责任/注册制度、亦无欧盟式户外噪声指令（户外设备环境噪声标识）。因此进入尼泊尔的电冰箱受NBSM NS合格评定（安全，及适用时的EMC）、适用时的能效计划、器具层面的制冷剂处理、联网版本的NTA核准及进口商/海关要求管辖——但不受欧盟那样独立的RoHS/电池/噪声标识义务约束。须明言，以免出口商误以为须满足欧盟横向合规，或反之误以为欧盟RoHS/CE图样可替代NBSM NS合格评定。出口商仍应满足任何合同或买方施加的材料限制或环境要求，并核实尼泊尔无新引入规则。状态：信息性。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾不對家用電冰箱實施歐盟式橫向產品制度。具體而言：尼泊爾無對應歐盟RoHS指令（電氣/電子設備有害物質限制）的制度、無歐盟式電池法規生產者責任/註冊制度、亦無歐盟式戶外噪聲指令（戶外設備環境噪聲標識）。因此進入尼泊爾的電冰箱受NBSM NS合格評定（安全，及適用時的EMC）、適用時的能效計畫、器具層面的製冷劑處理、聯網版本的NTA核准及進口商/海關要求管轄——但不受歐盟那樣獨立的RoHS/電池/噪聲標識義務約束。須明言，以免出口商誤以為須滿足歐盟橫向合規，或反之誤以為歐盟RoHS/CE圖樣可替代NBSM NS合格評定。出口商仍應滿足任何合同或買方施加的材料限制或環境要求，並核實尼泊爾無新引入規則。狀態：資訊性。

standards_or_laws: No Nepal equivalent of EU RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU (restriction of hazardous substances)
No Nepal equivalent of EU Batteries Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 producer-responsibility/registration regime
No Nepal equivalent of EU Outdoor Noise Directive 2000/14/EC
Nepal controls = NBSM NS conformity + energy programme + appliance-level refrigerant handling + NTA (connected) + importer/customs

summary.en: China operates its own horizontal regimes that partly parallel the EU but are distinct from both the EU and Nepal: China RoHS (the Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products, GB/T 26572 limits, plus the SJ/T 11364 marking and conformity-assessment catalogue) requires hazardous-substance marking and, for catalogue products, conformity; battery handling falls under separate Chinese environmental rules; and noise is addressed through product GB standards rather than an outdoor-noise marking directive. None of these China-RoHS markings or Chinese battery/noise rules are required by Nepal, and equally they do not satisfy any Nepal obligation. For Nepal, the relevant point is simply that these EU-style horizontal layers are absent — the China-side equivalents are domestic and neither required nor recognised at the Nepal border for these specific horizontal topics.
summary.zh: 中国实施其自有横向制度，部分与欧盟平行，但与欧盟及尼泊尔均不同：中国RoHS（《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》、GB/T 26572限值，及SJ/T 11364标识与合格评定目录）要求有害物质标识，目录产品另需合格评定；电池处理受中国另行的环境规则约束；噪声通过产品GB标准处理，而非户外噪声标识指令。这些中国RoHS标识或中国电池/噪声规则均非尼泊尔所要求，同样也不满足任何尼泊尔义务。对尼泊尔而言，要点仅在于此类欧盟式横向层缺失——就这些特定横向主题，中国侧等效物属国内性质，在尼泊尔边境既非要求亦不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國實施其自有橫向制度，部分與歐盟平行，但與歐盟及尼泊爾均不同：中國RoHS（《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》、GB/T 26572限值，及SJ/T 11364標識與合格評定目錄）要求有害物質標識，目錄產品另需合格評定；電池處理受中國另行的環境規則約束；噪聲通過產品GB標準處理，而非戶外噪聲標識指令。這些中國RoHS標識或中國電池/噪聲規則均非尼泊爾所要求，同樣也不滿足任何尼泊爾義務。對尼泊爾而言，要點僅在於此類歐盟式橫向層缺失——就這些特定橫向主題，中國側等效物屬國內性質，在尼泊爾邊境既非要求亦不被認可。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS — Administrative Measures for hazardous substances in EEE; GB/T 26572 limits; SJ/T 11364 marking + conformity catalogue
Noise addressed via product GB standards (no outdoor-noise marking directive)

gap.en: Plainly: Nepal imposes no RoHS, battery-registration, or outdoor-noise marking obligation on refrigerators, so there is no Nepal-side action required on these specific horizontal topics — and EU RoHS/CE or China-RoHS marking neither helps nor substitutes for NBSM NS conformity. Practical guidance: (a) do not budget for a Nepal RoHS/battery/noise compliance step (none exists); (b) do not assume EU horizontal compliance carries weight at the Nepal border for market access — NBSM NS conformity is the operative control; (c) still honour any buyer/contractual material-restriction or environmental clauses, which are commercial rather than regulatory; and (d) re-verify before each campaign that Nepal has not introduced a new horizontal rule. The absence of these regimes simplifies the Nepal file relative to the EU but does not reduce the NBSM NS / importer / logistics obligations covered in the other rows.
gap.zh: 明言之：尼泊尔不对电冰箱施加RoHS、电池注册或户外噪声标识义务，故就这些特定横向主题尼泊尔侧无须采取行动——且欧盟RoHS/CE或中国RoHS标识既无助益亦不替代NBSM NS合格评定。实务指引：（a）不必为尼泊尔RoHS/电池/噪声合规环节列预算（并不存在）；（b）不要以为欧盟横向合规在尼泊尔边境对市场准入有分量——NBSM NS合格评定才是有效管控；（c）仍应履行任何买方/合同的材料限制或环境条款，此属商业而非监管性质；（d）每次推广前重新核实尼泊尔未引入新横向规则。这些制度的缺失相对欧盟简化了尼泊尔文档，但并不减少其他行所涵盖的NBSM NS／进口商／物流义务。
gap.zht: 明言之：尼泊爾不對電冰箱施加RoHS、電池註冊或戶外噪聲標識義務，故就這些特定橫向主題尼泊爾側無須採取行動——且歐盟RoHS/CE或中國RoHS標識既無助益亦不替代NBSM NS合格評定。實務指引：（a）不必為尼泊爾RoHS/電池/噪聲合規環節列預算（並不存在）；（b）不要以為歐盟橫向合規在尼泊爾邊境對市場准入有分量——NBSM NS合格評定才是有效管控；（c）仍應履行任何買方/合同的材料限制或環境條款，此屬商業而非監管性質；（d）每次推廣前重新核實尼泊爾未引入新橫向規則。這些制度的缺失相對歐盟簡化了尼泊爾文檔，但並不減少其他行所涵蓋的NBSM NS／進口商／物流義務。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable — Nepal operates no EU-style RoHS, battery-registration, or outdoor-noise marking regime for refrigerators; NBSM NS conformity + importer/customs are the operative controls
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic only — China RoHS marking and Chinese battery/noise rules apply in China but are neither required nor recognised at the Nepal border for these horizontal topics

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal does not operate EU-style RoHS, battery-registration, or outdoor-noise marking regimes for household refrigerators, so no Nepal-side action is required on these horizontal topics and EU/China RoHS marking does not substitute for NBSM NS conformity. Honour any buyer/contractual material or environmental clauses as commercial terms, and re-verify before each campaign that Nepal has introduced no new horizontal rule. NBSM NS conformity, importer and logistics remain the operative obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔不对家用电冰箱实施欧盟式RoHS、电池注册或户外噪声标识制度，故这些横向主题尼泊尔侧无须行动，且欧盟/中国RoHS标识不替代NBSM NS合格评定。请将任何买方/合同的材料或环境条款作为商业条款履行，并在每次推广前重新核实尼泊尔未引入新横向规则。NBSM NS合格评定、进口商与物流仍为有效义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾不對家用電冰箱實施歐盟式RoHS、電池註冊或戶外噪聲標識制度，故這些橫向主題尼泊爾側無須行動，且歐盟/中國RoHS標識不替代NBSM NS合格評定。請將任何買方/合同的材料或環境條款作為商業條款履行，並在每次推廣前重新核實尼泊爾未引入新橫向規則。NBSM NS合格評定、進口商與物流仍為有效義務。
